entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop, Cajanus spp., used in this study.

entities.name: DART MARKERS
entities.description: Diversity arrays technology markers used for genetic mapping.

entities.name: ICP 28
entities.description: A pigeon pea line, Cajanus cajan, used as a parent in the cross.

entities.name: ICPW 94
entities.description: A pigeon pea line, Cajanus scarabaeoides, used as a parent in the cross.

entities.name: F2 MAPPING POPULATION
entities.description: A population derived from an interspecific cross, consisting of 72 progenies.

entities.name: GENETIC MAP
entities.description: A representation of the relative positions of genetic markers along a chromosome.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map based on the frequency of recombination between markers.

entities.name: MENDELIAN SEGREGATION
entities.description: The expected pattern of inheritance based on Mendel's laws.

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUME
entities.description: A category of crops including pigeon pea.
